{#- Override of ablog/collection.html — renders blog.html (all posts), tag pages, year archives. Card-style listing inspired by blog.python.org. -#} {%- extends "page.html" %} {%- macro postlink(post) -%} {%- if post.external_link -%}{{ post.external_link }} {%- else -%}{{ pathto(post.docname) }}{{ anchor(post) }} {%- endif -%} {%- endmacro -%} {%- set month_abbr = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec'] -%} {% block body %}
{% if pagename != ablog.blog_path %}

{{ header }} {% if collection.href %}{{ collection }} {% else %}{{ collection }}{% endif %}

{% endif %} {%- set years = [] -%} {%- for post in collection -%} {%- if post.published and post.date.year not in years -%} {%- set _ = years.append(post.date.year) -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor %}
{% if pagename != ablog.blog_path %}
Posts
  • {{ collection|length }}
{% endif %} {% if pagename == ablog.blog_path and years|length > 1 %}
Years
    {% for year in years -%}
  • {{ year }}
    • {%- endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if pagename == ablog.blog_path or pagename.startswith(ablog.blog_path ~ '/tag/') %}
Tags
    {% for tag in ablog.tags -%} {% if tag|string != 'featured' %}{{ tag }} {{ tag|length }}{% endif %} {%- endfor %}
{% endif %}
    {% for post in collection %} {% set ns = namespace(featured=false) %} {% for tag in post.tags or [] %}{% if tag|string == 'featured' %}{% set ns.featured = true %}{% endif %}{% endfor %} {% set featured = ns.featured %}
  1. {% if post.published %} {{ month_abbr[post.date.month - 1] }} {{ post.date.day }}, {{ post.date.year }} {% else %} Draft {% endif %}

    {{ post.title }} {% if featured %}Featured{% endif %}

    {% if post.excerpt %}
    {{ post.to_html(pagename) | safe }}
    {% endif %} {% if post.tags %}
      {% for tag in post.tags|sort %} {% if tag|string != 'featured' %}
    • {{ tag }}
      • {% endif %} {% endfor %}
    {% endif %}
    2. {% endfor %}
{% endblock body %}
